questions.questionText: What do we learn about Sherry Christian?
questions.questionTextZh: 关于Sherry Christian我们了解到什么？

options.label: A
options.text: She is making a special effort to be recognized.

options.label: B
options.text: She has been living in Fayetteville for 25 years.

options.label: C
options.text: She has been driving a school bus ever since 2009.

options.label: D
options.text: She is the longest-serving bus driver in Fayetteville.

questions.questionText: What did city officials of Fayetteville want bus drivers to be aware of?
questions.questionTextZh: 费耶特维尔市官员希望公交车司机意识到什么？

options.label: A
options.text: The importance of their service to the city.

options.label: B
options.text: The number of riders they serve in the city.

options.label: C
options.text: The new proclamation issued early this week.

options.label: D
options.text: The significance of the event to take place March 18.

questions.questionText: What does the news report say the Wilton school board has done?
questions.questionTextZh: 新闻报道说威尔顿学校董事会做了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Budgeted $56.7 million for the coming school year.

options.label: B
options.text: Requested to raise teachers' salaries by 3 percent.

options.label: C
options.text: Proposed a spending increase by 5.99 percent.

options.label: D
options.text: Kept raising funds for at least 8 budget cycles.

questions.questionText: What will a decline in the total enrollment lead to?
questions.questionTextZh: 总入学人数下降会导致什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Decrease in salaries for school administrators.

options.label: B
options.text: Reduction in federal and state funding.

options.label: C
options.text: Firing of less qualified faculty members.

options.label: D
options.text: Closing down of some less competitive schools.

questions.questionText: What do we learn about thunder snows from the report?
questions.questionTextZh: 从报道中我们了解到关于雷雪的什么信息？

options.label: A
options.text: They often take place in the Scottish Highlands.

options.label: B
options.text: They usually happen in the middle of the night.

options.label: C
options.text: Their damage can be as serious as that of bombs.

options.label: D
options.text: Their loud claps can be confused with explosions.

questions.questionText: What did the police do when they received the local residents' phone calls?
questions.questionTextZh: 警方接到当地居民电话后做了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: They sent out a message to calm them down.

options.label: B
options.text: They promised to stop the construction work.

options.label: C
options.text: They told them the military exercise was over.

options.label: D
options.text: They set off to inspect the site of the plane crash.

questions.questionText: What were people advised to do when traveling outside?
questions.questionTextZh: 人们被建议在外出时做什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Keep warm.

options.label: B
options.text: Take caution.

options.label: C
options.text: Avoid driving.

options.label: D
options.text: Use rail service.

questions.questionText: What does the woman say she was actually wondering about?
questions.questionTextZh: 女士说她实际上在想什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Why the man is so anxious to buy a new phone.

options.label: B
options.text: How the man could possibly afford a new phone.

options.label: C
options.text: How the man got into the habit of being wasteful.

options.label: D
options.text: Why the man is so fond of using his credit card.

questions.questionText: Why is the man a little embarrassed by the phone he's using now?
questions.questionTextZh: 为什么男士对他现在使用的手机感到有点尴尬？

options.label: A
options.text: It is not in fashion any more.

options.label: B
options.text: It goes out of order frequently.

options.label: C
options.text: It is not as fancy as his colleagues'.

options.label: D
options.text: It lacks functions office work requires.

questions.questionText: What does the man say about the credit card he just got?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士说他刚办的信用卡有什么特点？

options.label: A
options.text: It enables him to buy a new phone at a more favorable price.

options.label: B
options.text: It is a special offer to recent college graduates working in offices.

options.label: C
options.text: It is available to office workers who have a good enough credit score.

options.label: D
options.text: It allows him to borrow money without paying interest for six months.

questions.questionText: What do we learn about one of the woman's colleagues?
questions.questionTextZh: 关于女士的一位同事我们了解到什么？

options.label: A
options.text: She borrowed money to pay her debt.

options.label: B
options.text: She developed a habit of overspending.

options.label: C
options.text: She enjoys buying a lot of fancy things.

options.label: D
options.text: She regrets ignoring the woman's advice.

questions.questionText: What does the tiny home movement mainly advocate?
questions.questionTextZh: 小房子运动主要倡导什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Blog writing and natural resources saving.

options.label: B
options.text: Joint efforts to improve the local community.

options.label: C
options.text: Audience participation in The Morning Show.

options.label: D
options.text: Home ownership and environmental protection.

questions.questionText: What does the woman say about houses as small as twenty square meters?
questions.questionTextZh: 女士对20平方米大小的房子有什么看法？

options.label: A
options.text: Not a realistic size for families.

options.label: B
options.text: Not welcomed by most Americans.

options.label: C
options.text: Only fit for families of four or less.

options.label: D
options.text: Only suitable for renting to the poor.

questions.questionText: What does the man think about the dream of owning a 150 square meter house?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士对拥有150平方米房子的梦想有什么看法？

options.label: A
options.text: It should be changed.

options.label: B
options.text: It isn't easy to realize.

options.label: C
options.text: It will come true sooner or later.

options.label: D
options.text: It doesn't appeal to average families.

questions.questionText: What does the man say about tiny homes?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士对小房子有什么看法？

options.label: A
options.text: They help to lower housing prices.

options.label: B
options.text: They help to save up for larger houses.

options.label: C
options.text: They are a good choice for many people.

options.label: D
options.text: They are vital to reducing waste worldwide.

questions.questionText: What do children seem to have a natural desire to do?
questions.questionTextZh: 孩子们似乎天生渴望做什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Play outdoors and enjoy themselves.

options.label: B
options.text: Beat challenges and take risks.

options.label: C
options.text: Take care of their well-being.

options.label: D
options.text: Grow up strong and healthy.

questions.questionText: According to the American Psychological Association, what does regular physical activity do to children?
questions.questionTextZh: 根据美国心理学会，定期体育活动对孩子有什么作用？

options.label: A
options.text: Enable them to develop their motor skills.

options.label: B
options.text: Help them to conceal their frustration.

options.label: C
options.text: Reduce their stress and depression.

options.label: D
options.text: Prevent them from feeling lonely.

questions.questionText: What does the passage say about cultivating the habit of physical activity?
questions.questionTextZh: 关于培养体育活动习惯，文章说了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: It begins early.

options.label: B
options.text: It proves demanding.

options.label: C
options.text: It calls for lifelong efforts.

options.label: D
options.text: It lies in nature experiences.

questions.questionText: When are job seekers willing to explore jobs with lower salaries according to a new study?
questions.questionTextZh: 根据一项新研究，求职者什么时候愿意探索薪资较低的工作？

options.label: A
options.text: When companies share their information online.

options.label: B
options.text: When their job search criteria are met fully.

options.label: C
options.text: When companies embrace greater diversity.

options.label: D
options.text: When they find job postings visually attractive.

questions.questionText: What did participants see in the baseline condition of the study?
questions.questionTextZh: 参与者在研究的基准条件下看到了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Emails in the normal format.

options.label: B
options.text: Major companies in one location.

options.label: C
options.text: All companies in the same sector.

options.label: D
options.text: Various aspects of a company's workforce.

questions.questionText: What does the passage say participants seem to be paying attention to?
questions.questionTextZh: 文章说参与者似乎在关注什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Job security.

options.label: B
options.text: Potential pay raises.

options.label: C
options.text: Minimum base salary.

options.label: D
options.text: Information about diversity.

questions.questionText: What does the passage say about the findings of a new study from Oregon State University?
questions.questionTextZh: 关于俄勒冈州立大学一项新研究的发现，文章说了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Positive.

options.label: B
options.text: Original.

options.label: C
options.text: Important.

options.label: D
options.text: Surprising.

questions.questionText: What does a growing body of evidence show according to the passage?
questions.questionTextZh: 根据文章，越来越多的证据显示什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Dogs match their behavior with kids as much as with adults.

options.label: B
options.text: Kids and adults alike find in dogs a source of attachment.

options.label: C
options.text: Kids' attitude to dogs is influenced by adults.

options.label: D
options.text: Dogs can help kids in many ways.

questions.questionText: What did Monique Udell say their study suggests?
questions.questionTextZh: Monique Udell说他们的研究表明什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Dogs pay much attention to the kids they live with.

options.label: B
options.text: Dogs view both adults and kids as social companions.

options.label: C
options.text: Kids differ from adults in their behavior towards dogs.

options.label: D
options.text: Kids need to be aware of the risks in playing with dogs.

questions.questionText: What does research show kids are very capable of doing?
questions.questionTextZh: 研究表明孩子们非常擅长做什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Understanding dogs.

options.label: B
options.text: Training dogs.

options.label: C
options.text: Taking care of dogs.

options.label: D
options.text: Associating with dogs.
